meta.title: Bacteriophages of Bacillus cereus and of Crystal-forming Insect Pathogens Related to B. cereus

abstractHtml: SUMMARY Four phages isolated from bacteria of the Bacillus cereus group are described. They show cross-reactions between crystal-forming and non-crystal-forming strains which are deficient in ability to produce a lecithinase C. The implications of this finding are discussed.
affiliationsHtml: • Department of Bacteriology, University of Glasgow
